# MuleSoft Monitoring

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of Monitoring documentation.
> See [Monitoring llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/monitoring/llms-full.txt) for all the Monitoring documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Getting Alerts (Canada and Japan)](https://docs.mulesoft.com/monitoring/alerts-jp-ca.md)
